chosen_action.title: Stop post-hold measurement_hold drift when a refreshed Codeberg-first publisher packet is already the truthful follow-through asset

why_this_action.summary: The latest artifacts had drifted into a false state: the execution board could already surface a do-now primary-repo-flat publisher packet after the blocker cleared, but the selector could still collapse to measurement_hold because refreshed same-path packet deliveries were treated as still active and refreshed publisher packets were not counted as current unless a newer packet-generation log existed after the file mtime.
shared_findings_used: agents/marketing/logs/distribution_lane_latest.json: lane still reported measurement_hold at 2026-05-25T17:04:00 despite its own reasons admitting the primary-repo-flat packet should be packaged
drafts/marketing_execution_board_latest.md: at the same 2026-05-25T17:04:00 checkpoint the board surfaced a do-now primary-repo-flat publisher contact packet for TIMEWELL, Toolradar, and Morph

agents/marketing/logs/marketing_2026-05-25_primary_repo_flat_contact_manual_delivery_refresh.json: earlier same-path delivery covered an older materially different target set and should not suppress the refreshed packet forever

agents/marketing/logs/marketing_2026-05-25_primary_repo_flat_contact_handoff_packet_execution.json: a recent matching prep log already existed for the refreshed packet family even though the packet file had been updated later the same day

agents/marketing/logs/marketing_workflow_audit_latest.json: same-family publisher overlap should block another net-new burst, not hide a current truthful follow-through asset once a different lane is exhausted

result.summary: Patched the selector/execution truth checks so refreshed same-path primary-repo-flat packet deliveries no longer suppress a materially newer packet, and a refreshed publisher packet can still count as current when its content matches the untouched target set and a recent matching prep log already exists. Added regression coverage for both the delivery-guard and follow-through-selection cases.

verification.live_board_1704: primary-repo-flat publisher contact packet surfaced again as a truthful do-now asset for TIMEWELL, Toolradar, Morph
verification.live_selector_1704: no longer returned measurement_hold; it advanced to a follow-through lane instead of idling

replacement_condition: If a future post-hold run still ranks a lower-priority manual outreach asset above a higher-priority current primary-repo-flat publisher packet for the same truth window, escalate into selector lane-priority repair instead of logging another follow-through placeholder.
